Parcel Management — CI/CD Pipeline

5-stage pipeline · 7 workflow files · develop → staging → production

Shift Left

  • • Lint & SAST run first (~30s)
  • • Fail fast — save 3 min per push
  • • CodeQL catches injection, secrets
  • • Dependabot auto-PRs vuln fixes

Immutable Artifacts

  • • Build once, promote through envs
  • • staging-{sha} → prod-{sha}
  • • GHCR for staging, ECR for prod
  • • No rebuild between environments

Defense in Depth

  • • CI gate → staging deploy → smoke
  • • PR plan → human approval → apply
  • • Post-deploy smoke → auto-rollback
  • • Branch protection enforced on all

Parcel Management CI/CD · Proposed Pipeline Redesign · .github/cicd-plan/
